vocab.meaning: làm cho sạch đẹp, chỉnh trang lại
vocab.example: The local council really needs to spruce up the existing parks before building new ones.

vocab.meaning: xuất hiện hoặc mọc lên nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I'd love to see more community gardens spring up in the vacant lots around my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: gây ra, dẫn đến (sự thay đổi tích cực)
vocab.example: Adding a public library would bring about a significant improvement in the local literacy rate.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng, tạo điều kiện tiếp cận
vocab.example: Opening up more green spaces would provide a much-needed breathing room for city dwellers.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho, đáp ứng nhu cầu của
vocab.example: New public areas should cater to all age groups, from toddler playgrounds to senior fitness zones.
I am definitely rooting for the proposal to turn the old factory into a cultural community center.

vocab.meaning: tận dụng, khai thác (nguồn lực có sẵn)
vocab.example: The design of new plazas could draw on our local heritage to create a unique sense of place.

vocab.meaning: làm cho trở nên khác biệt, đặc biệt
vocab.example: What would set our district apart is a dedicated zone for street performers and outdoor exhibitions.

vocab.meaning: làm mới, cải tạo cho tươi mới hơn
vocab.example: They should freshen up the riverside walk with better lighting and modern seating arrangements.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy, nuôi dưỡng (mối quan hệ/tình cảm)
vocab.example: Public squares are essential because they foster a sense of belonging among residents.
